# Portfolio Website Project

## Project Overview
Modern portfolio website built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Ready for Azure Static Web Apps deployment.

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion
